findings.regression_check_summary: 8 checks performed (RC-1 to RC-8). 7 PASS as designed. RC-6 caught a write-discipline ambiguity in my own draft (decider would have double-counted rewrite-attempts on audit-fail) — bundled a self-correction addendum in the amendment per operator preference for 'single comprehensive amendment, not multiple round trips'. Per user-preference 'think about the other side of the argument too', this catch came from playing devil's advocate on the draft.

After Phase 2d, supervise the first manual run of dome-sloppytoppy-rewrite per PROP-041 phased_implementation_plan.
